_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the image-variable branch (C4) of the word-activities/add-picture-failures playbook. Agent must chain: folders list-current-user -> jobs list --state Faulted -> jobs get / logs (resolved ImagePath is the literal 'UiPath.Core.Image') -> workflow source (ImagePath bound to screenshotImage.ToString(), an in-memory UiPath.Core.Image). The combination of (Image variable bound to ImagePath in source) + (filename 'UiPath.Core.Image' in the resolved path) is decisive. Scrubbed: host->MOCK-HOST, robot->AUTOMATION1.

rules._doc: Open-ended natural-language query; proxy to the real uip CLI per troubleshoot test rules.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns an empty array so the agent can explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.
